title: Field-tested: Michigan Tech Grad Hikes from Isle Royale Research to a National Park Service Career
summary_en: Backpacking off-trail for a month over a more than 200-square-mile island chain is more demanding than your average camping trip. But for graduating Michigan Tech senior Jacob Sutter, wild places like Isle Royale National Park are where he finds happiness.  . . .
title_cn: [待翻译] Field-tested: Michigan Tech Grad Hikes from Isle Royale Research to a National Park Service Career
